calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Set For Trial On Dec-02-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 624

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Continued To Dec-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eric Collison, Plaintiff and Appellee; Curtis F. Dowling, Esq., for and with Xanthe Asher, Defendant and Appellant; Ken Pine, husband of Appellant Xanthe Asher.

This matter comes on for trial de novo. All witnesses, including Mr. Dowling, are placed under oath.

Mr. Dowling offers testimony on behalf of Ms. Asher. Mr. Pine offers testimony on behalf of Ms. Asher.

The following exhibits are identified:

Exh. A - Tenant Estopple Certificate - 08/23/17
Exh. B - Security Deposit Refund Letter - 05/20/20
Exh. C - Stipulation for Settlement
Exh. D - Cashier's Check 0007807014 - $3,387.14 - 05/21/20
Exh. E - Ng Letter - Re: Washer/Dryer - 09/14/20
Exh. F - Cashier's Check - 0000602404 - $18,447.50 - 04/28/20
Exh. G - Various photographs - washer/dryer condition, repairs

Eric Collisson offers testimony on his own behalf.

The following exhibits are identified:

Exh. 1 - Residential Lease - 06/18/07
Exh. 3 - Interest Calculation
Exh. 4 - Collisson Letter - Re: Security Deposit - 05/30/20
Exh. 6 - Faucet repait receipt - $65.01 - 12/05/19
Exh. 8 - E-mail - Collisson-Visaya - Re: Inspection Results - 04/30/20

The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Angela Bradstreet; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. D624

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-15-2020 Judgment Entered
